tasks.title: Create Cobra CLI skeleton with subcommands
tasks.description: Set up the root command and implement init, run, status, review, and rollback subcommands with flag parsing.
tasks.design_notes: Define a central Config struct loaded from .env and pass it via context to all subcommands.

tasks.title: Load and validate environment variables
tasks.description: Implement .env parsing, required variable checks, and expose a Config object for the application.
tasks.design_notes: Use github.com/joho/godotenv and panic on missing critical keys to fail fast.

tasks.title: Implement codebase scanner
tasks.description: Read README and walk the project tree to build a concise summary string for the planner prompt.
tasks.design_notes: Cache the summary in memory; recompute only when files change via the file watcher.

tasks.title: Build planner agent integration
tasks.description: Call the HuggingFace inference endpoint with the summary and feature description, parse the JSON task list into internal structs.
tasks.design_notes: Wrap HTTP calls in a reusable LLMClient with timeout and retry logic.

tasks.title: Define devdive.json state model and atomic IO
tasks.description: Create Go structs for the full state, implement thread‑safe read/write with file locking and JSON marshaling.
tasks.design_notes: Protect state with a sync.RWMutex and expose Get/Update methods.

tasks.title: GitHub Issues and Contents API wrapper
tasks.description: Create functions to create issues with labels, commit devdive.json via the Contents API, and poll Actions workflow status.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate all GitHub calls in a GithubClient that handles authentication and rate‑limit retries.

tasks.title: File system watcher and WebSocket broadcast
tasks.description: Use fsnotify to watch devdive.json and other relevant files, broadcasting updates to all WS clients.
tasks.design_notes: Debounce rapid events (≤200ms) to avoid flooding the socket.

tasks.title: Git commit watcher and semantic analysis
tasks.description: Poll git log for new commits, send diffs to the LLM, parse task progress, and update state accordingly.
tasks.design_notes: Run the watcher in a goroutine with context cancellation; maintain last‑seen commit SHA.

tasks.title: Design review dispatcher
tasks.description: Trigger an LLM design‑drift check every 10 commits or on manual review command, store findings in state.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage the same LLMClient as the planner; categorize findings by severity enum.

tasks.title: Nudge generation service
tasks.description: Analyze state (estimates, CI status, drift) and append actionable nudges to devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Create a pure function that receives state and returns a slice of nudges for testability.

tasks.title: HTTP server with embedded frontend
tasks.description: Set up Gorilla mux to serve static assets from the embedded dist folder and upgrade WS connections.
tasks.design_notes: Use go:embed for internal/server/dist/* and serve with http.FS.

tasks.title: WebSocket hub implementation
tasks.description: Manage client connections, broadcast state updates, and handle graceful disconnects.
tasks.design_notes: Implement the hub as a singleton with channels for register, unregister, and broadcast.

tasks.title: Preact dashboard WS integration and core pages
tasks.description: Connect to the WS endpoint, consume state updates, and render Issues, CI, Nudges, Reviews, and Settings pages.
tasks.design_notes: Create a React Context for the WebSocket and use hooks to sync state to components.

tasks.title: CI monitor watcher
tasks.description: Periodically poll the GitHub Actions API for workflow runs and update the CI section of the state.
tasks.design_notes: Run as a background goroutine with exponential backoff on failures.

tasks.title: Write unit and integration tests
tasks.description: Add test coverage for planner, state IO, GitHub client, commit analysis parsing, and WS broadcasting.
tasks.design_notes: Use httptest.Server to mock LLM and GitHub endpoints; achieve ≥80% coverage.

tasks.title: Add build scripts and CI pipeline
tasks.description: Create npm script for Vite build, Go makefile target to embed assets, and a GitHub Actions workflow to run tests.
tasks.design_notes: Make 'make build' perform npm run build → go build in one step.
